title: Enchanting Realms
description: Adds a new mystical dimension with new blocks.
body:
Explore a new dimension full of new blocks, creatures and adventures!

### **This mod requires Geckolib and Curios API to work properly.**

# **FEATURES**


This mod is currently unfinished. It adds:

**7 new biomes:**

· Enchanted Forest

· Enchanted Plains

· Hex Forest

· Hex Plains

· Enchanted Icy Plains

· Volcanic Mountains

· Overgrown Forest

**3 new wood types:**

· Pastel blue wood

· Pastel red wood

· Pastel green wood

**4 new flowers:**

· Enchanted Flower

· Hex Rose

· Green Rose

· Green Rose Bush

**3 new zombie variants:**

· Enchanted Zombie

· Hexed Zombie

· Frozen Zombie

· Overgrown Forest

**1 new enchantment:**

· Frost Aspect

**2 new potion effects:**

· Enchanted effect

· Hexed Effect

**2 new armor sets:**

· Blue Crystal Armor

· Red Crystal Armor

· Green Crystal Armor

**2 new brick types:**

· Blue Bricks

· Red Bricks

· Green Bricks

~~**And much more coming soon!**~~

## **GUIDE**

First off, youll have to make an iron/gold ring.

RECIPE:

![Iron Ring Recipe:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75146279d6fcdc7aca5f34e967843ecea09d7114.png)

Then, youll have to get any enchanted  book.

After that, youll have to make an enchanted ring.

RECIPE:

![Enchanted Ring Recipe:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46ee29cb1b0f91379c1fe7f40d47bc6a60a4bbd7.png)

Finally, youll have to make the portal frame out of oak wood logs, and then right click twice on the portal frame.
